# Description

Please include a summary of the changes and which issue this addresses.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Content update (text, images, profile data)
- [ ] Layout/template change
- [ ] Configuration change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested the site locally with `hugo server`
- [ ] I have verified the changes visually in a browser
- [ ] I have checked mobile responsiveness
- [ ] All content is sourced from `profile-data/structured/` (if applicable)
- [ ] I have spell-checked all content (American English)
- [ ] I have not added any placeholder or lorem ipsum text

## Screenshots (if applicable)

<!-- Add screenshots of the changes, especially for layout or visual changes -->

## Testing Steps

1. Run `hugo server`
2. Navigate to the affected page(s)
3. Verify the changes render correctly
